description: Initially started as a blogging tool in 2003, it has evolved into a highly flexible CMS that powers over 40% of the web. WordPress 7 requires MySQL 8.0 and is packaged as a new app alongside the legacy WordPress 6 entry.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
🆕 WORDPRESS V7 - SEPARATE APP

This is a NEW app, separate from 'wordpress' (v6). Both can run simultaneously.

FOR NEW USERS:
✅ Install this app for new WordPress deployments
✅ Pairs WordPress 7.0.1 with MySQL 8.0 (WordPress 7 requires MySQL 8.0)

FOR V6 USERS:
⚠️  Do NOT uninstall your 'wordpress' v6 app
⚠️  Deploy this as a NEW app alongside v6
⚠️  WordPress 7 rejects MySQL 5.7, and a 5.7 data directory does not upgrade in-place to 8.0
⚠️  Migration requires a manual MySQL dump/reload — back up your database first

Support: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/

title: WordPress v7
